Title: Education
Content:
I hold a degree in Computer Engineering, with a specialization in Software Engineering from the University of Almería. Throughout my academic career, I gained proficiency in technologies such as Java and SQL, while focusing on architecting maintainable, scalable, and optimized systems. My approach ensures that all development adheres strictly to SOLID principles. Furthermore, I have experience leading development teams under Agile methodologies.

Additionally, I completed an Erasmus+ program (2023-2024) at the Università Degli Studi di Ferrara, Italy. This experience significantly enhanced my adaptability, my ability to solve problems in unconventional scenarios, and my communication competencies within multicultural environments.

Title: Languages
Content:
- Spanish: Native.
- English: Cambridge B2 First Certificate.
- French: Alliance Française B1 Certificate.
- Italian: Acquired and refined during my professional and academic stay in Ferrara.

Title: Software Engineering vs Just coding
Content: In a landscape where AI has commoditized routine coding, my focus remains on what machines cannot replicate: engineering judgment. I view technology not as an end in itself, but as a lever for efficiency. By leveraging Artificial Intelligence to accelerate execution, I focus my cognitive bandwidth on what truly drives value—designing robust architectures based on SOLID principles and solving complex, scalable business problems.
